Usage: liver [options] [command]

BAC tracking CLI

Options:
  -V, --version             output the version number
  --human                   Human-readable output
  --no-color                Disable colors
  -v, --verbose             Verbose logging
  --formula <formula>       BAC formula override (watson|widmark)
  -h, --help                display help for command

Commands:
  profile
  preset
  session
  add [options] [preset]    Add a drink
  start [options] [preset]  Start drinking
  stop [options]            Stop current drink
  drink
  status                    Current BAC status
  bac [options]             BAC at specific time
  curve [options]           BAC curve
  sober [options]           Time until sober
  stats [options]           Drinking statistics
  config
  help [command]            display help for command
